title: SELECT EXTRACT is wrong
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE B (ID INT PRIMARY KEY, FIPS2 DATETIME, VALUE DECIMAL(10, 5));
SELECT (SECOND(FIPS2) * 1000000) - 999990 FROM B WHERE VALUE IS NOT NULL;
SELECT A.ID, SECOND(A.FIPS2) FROM B AS A JOIN B AS C ON A.ID = C.ID WHERE C.VALUE IS NULL;
key_bug_features: SELECT EXTRACT with TIMESTAMP precision issue
